feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Taking huge heap memory by SAP JCO library
entry.content:
we are seeing java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space in SAP Java connector. After analyzing heap dumps, we came to know is, for 278 MB file, jco is taking around 2GB heap memory. 

For 400 mb file, it taking around 3.2GB.

1. We need to know if the Idoc file is having x size , how much approximate memory required (2x, 4x,6x,8x,10x) to process this file using java program.

For example, if the Idoc file is 100 MB, do we need around 400/600/800 MB of java heap  memory to process the file.

2. Is there anyway by which java application will get to know the file size using SapJCO api before start processing/reading file?

Error:

One instance of “com.sap.conn.rfc.data.ARFCSDATA” loaded by “com.test.$Loader @ 0x60129d7a8” occupies 2,790.48 MB (34.17%) bytes. The memory is accumulated in one instance of “char[][]”, loaded by “<system class loader>”, which occupies 2,790.47 MB (34.17%) bytes.

entry.title: How to check the socket communication log
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Check the connection status between SAP and external devices at the socket communication handshake level.
Could you tell me how to check the logs (transactions)?
For example:
socket->bind()->listen()->connect()->accept()
at the log level.
If available, the transaction code and the log name to be referenced
I would appreciate it if you could tell me.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to check Netweaver version on SAP Java system ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am contacting you because I'd like to check the Netweaver version of my Java system. Can you tell me what steps I need to take?

 

Thank in advance.

Regards,

entry.title: production orders at work center using cois_select_order_data_read
entry.content: I need to pull production orders at a specific workcenter, but I cannot seem to find any success using the cois_select_order_data_read fm. Any suggestions?

entry.title: Extract Data from File fetched from UI
entry.content:
Hi All,

From UI I can able to fetch the file and store it into a folder but in next step I'm facing little issue to fetch file from folder.
Using From ASCII pass I can achieve it but I need to make it dynamic so that in next action task it takes the file from same place where it had store in first action task.
I tried storing the path in job variable in action task 1 but couldn't able to fetch this variable data in action task 2.

Please assist.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM
entry.content: After implementing SAP Note 3395784, Error 8 on TOC Create In ChaRM. Mismatched parameters in FM CHANGEDOCUMENT_READ_ALL

entry.title: Invalid RMS ID
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We have an issue with one user set up. 

Dispute case was created and sent for approval, when approver goes to DRA Worklist he gets error 'Invalid RMS ID' and is unable to locate any dispute case assigned to him for approval. 

We have no clue what is the reason here and IT is no help... 

Any hint highly appreciated 😊

entry.title: how to implement auto-increment event 05 SAP views?
entry.content: Hello everyone! I need to implement event 05 in a view created directly from SE11 (Go to SE11 -> Create View -> Maintenance View), this event should make an auto-increment of a field in my table using the NUMBER_GET_NEXT function. Once I get the next number from the function, I try to do ztable-incrementalfield = incremental but it doesn’t work. Does anyone know which field I should reference to the ztable-incrementalfield to take the value? Thank you very much!!

entry.title: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter
entry.content:
Hi Sap,

We are reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter and rebuilding the affected indexes in our SAP environment. 

Please let us know if 

  1. Any potential risks or side effects associated with this change.
  2. Impact on data consistency.
  3. Any recommended best practice or steps to mitigate risks and ensure a smooth transition.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Details in ABAP program
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

Can anyone help me how to retrieve the authentication data like user name in logical port? In tcode SOAMANAGER > Service Administration > Web Service Configuration then Search by Consumer Proxy then Display. I would like to get the userID in ABAP program. Can someone help me know in what table were they stored?

From my side I have used ST05 to trace the webservice update process. But I couldn't find related data from the table which listed by ST05 like SRT_CFG_DIR, SRT_CFG_CLI_ASGN, SRT_RTC_CFGVAL, SRT_RTC_DATA, etc.....

Is the authentication data not stored in SAP table or it stored as some encrypt  format? I only need to get the Logical Port authentication UserID to generate a report to list it for different configuration connection.

entry.title: Offline Backup
entry.content:
Hi, In our production system, we've scheduled for one offline backup each week, and a daily online backup. However, encountering issues post the offline backup, such as some locks are not cleared causing disruptions to our operations, prompts us to reconsider the frequency of our offline backups. We aim to determine the best practice for offline backups, whether it should occur weekly, monthly, or quarterly. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: We want to create a new sandbox server from MPM. Need gudance on DB steps
entry.content:
We have requirement of refreshing MPM data to a new sandbox environment. We are planning to go ahead with a VM restore of MPM and then change database files/name. Please guide us with the best possible option to carry out the task.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Systemcopy sap QAS longTime
entry.content: Hello everyone, I'm performing the homogeneous system copy of my SAP QAS SQL Server 2019 on Windows Server 2019 using SAPINS. I exported it, and it took approximately 72 hours. Now I'm in the process of importing it to another server, and it has been 6 days, but it hasn't finished yet. Is there anything in this process that can be done faster?

entry.title: How to quantify memory usage of an ABAP instance via Linux commands
entry.content:
Hi all,

I wanted to find out how much memory is allocated by a certain ABAP instance. I made the total of

ps -edalf | grep <sid>adm | tr -s " " | cut -f10 -d" " and 

ipcs -m | grep <sid>adm | tra -s " " | cut -f5 -d" "

but the result of this calculation is much below the real consumption. What is missing?

 

Rgds

Ulrich

entry.title: HANA DB PYTHON
entry.content:
We are currently in the process of upgrading our PERSON_NAME to 2.00.075.PHONE_NUMBER from 2.00.075.PHONE_NUMBER.
Our dev systems are already using 2.00.075, can you help to confirm the ff. inquiry:
1. Are we required to switch in python 3? current python version is 2
2. Can we still use python 2? If yes, is python2 still supported and until when?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: JMS driver based on jakarta.jms available for SAP Netweaver
entry.content:
We are using our SAP Netweaver Java System JSP as a JMS Broker System for all business critical communication.

The JMS Queues in JSP are used by SAP PO (on a seperate Netweaver System) as well as non-SAP-Systems.

Until now, we provided the libraries
sap.com~tc~exception~impl.jar
sap.com~tc~je~clientlib~impl.jar
sap.com~tc~logging~java~impl.jar
to the non-SAP-Systems to enable them to access the JMS Queues on SAP Netweaver.

We currently migrate the non-SAP-applications from JavaEE to JakartaEE, so we would need a JMS driver for SAP Netweaver that is based on jakarta.jms instead of javax.jms.

Is there a JMS driver based on jakarta.jms available for SAP Netweaver?

entry.title: ERROR: DEFAULT profile in the DB and in the file system are different
entry.content:
Hi!

I was wondering if anyone experienced this error before and could help out 🙂

I had freshly installed the SAP Netweaver Trial, and upon running SNCWIZARD transaction in SAP GUI I get this error: 

DEFAULT profile in the DB and in the file system are different

Now, I tried to import profiles of all active servers (via transaction RZ10), but that didn't work. I tried to active DEFAULT profile via RZ10; that changed nothing. Finally, I tried to activate DEFAULT.pfl profile via RZ10; this enabled SNCWIZARD. However, in this case, regardless of whether I setup SNCWIZARD, when I restart the SAP system, I can no longer log in via SAP GUI.

Anybody have a clue what is going on here? Much appreciated!

Niko

entry.title: SAP GUI for Java SNC Error
entry.content:
Hi there!

Appreciate if somebody knows what is wrong here..

I am using SAP GUI for Java in Ubuntu to connect to SAP Netweaver 7.52 Trial Edition, but I get this error: "sncgss.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or
directory". Where is this file, is it even included in the installation? How can I link it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Unhandled event loop exception in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating an ABAP project from Eclipse and getting "Unhandled event loop exception". 

Below is the error logs. 

java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid UUID string: messid_A50
at java.base/java.util.UUID.fromString1(UUID.java:280)
at java.base/java.util.UUID.fromString(UUID.java:258)
at com.sap.platin.landscape.common.SAPGUIElement.<init>(SAPGUIElement.java:23)
at com.sap.platin.landscape.common.Messageserver.<init>(Messageserver.java:23)
at com.sap.platin.landscape.common.SAPGUIConfig.getMessageserver(SAPGUIConfig.java:729)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SAPGUIConfigWrapper.loadLandscape(SAPGUIConfigWrapper.java:364)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SAPGUIConfigWrapper.<init>(SAPGUIConfigWrapper.java:219)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SapUiLandscapeReader.createSapguiConfigWrapper(SapUiLandscapeReader.java:741)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SapUiLandscapeReader.getSystemConfigurations(SapUiLandscapeReader.java:151)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SystemConfigurationService.getSystemConfigurationsFromPersistence(SystemConfigurationService.java:45)
at com.sap.adt.destinations.model.internal.config.SystemConfigurationService.getSystemConfigurations(SystemConfigurationService.java:39)
at com.sap.adt.project.ui.wizard.NewAdtCoreProjectWizardBase.hasSapLogonSystemConfigurations(NewAdtCoreProjectWizardBase.java:127)
at com.sap.adt.project.ui.wizard.NewAdtCoreProjectWizardBase.addPages(NewAdtCoreProjectWizardBase.java:113)
at org.eclipse.jface.wizard.WizardDialog.createContents(WizardDialog.java:634)
at org.eclipse.jface.window.Window.create(Window.java:431)
at org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog.create(Dialog.java:1092)
at org.eclipse.ui.internal.navigator.wizards.WizardShortcutAction.run(WizardShortcutAction.java:98)
at org.eclipse.ui.internal.views.helpers.EmptyWorkspaceHelper$1.linkActivated(EmptyWorkspaceHelper.java:283)
at org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.AbstractHyperlink.handleActivate(AbstractHyperlink.java:215)
at org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.AbstractHyperlink.handleMouseUp(AbstractHyperlink.java:309)
at org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.AbstractHyperlink.lambda$3(AbstractHyperlink.java:117)
at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.EventTable.sendEvent(EventTable.java:89)
at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.sendEvent(Display.java:4274)
at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Widget.sendEvent(Widget.java:1066)
at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.runDeferredEvents(Display.java:4072)
at org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display.readAndDispatch(Display.java:3660)
at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine$5.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1151)
at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:339)
at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.swt.PartRenderingEngine.run(PartRenderingEngine.java:1042)
at org.eclipse.e4.ui.internal.workbench.E4Workbench.createAndRunUI(E4Workbench.java:152)
at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.lambda$3(Workbench.java:639)
at org.eclipse.core.databinding.observable.Realm.runWithDefault(Realm.java:339)
at org.eclipse.ui.internal.Workbench.createAndRunWorkbench(Workbench.java:546)
at org.eclipse.ui.PlatformUI.createAndRunWorkbench(PlatformUI.java:173)
at org.eclipse.ui.internal.ide.application.IDEApplication.start(IDEApplication.java:152)
at org.eclipse.equinox.internal.app.EclipseAppHandle.run(EclipseAppHandle.java:208)
at org.eclipse.core.runtime.internal.adaptor.EclipseAppLauncher.runApplication(EclipseAppLauncher.java:143)
at org.eclipse.core.runtime.internal.adaptor.EclipseAppLauncher.start(EclipseAppLauncher.java:109)
at org.eclipse.core.runtime.adaptor.EclipseStarter.run(EclipseStarter.java:439)
at org.eclipse.core.runtime.adaptor.EclipseStarter.run(EclipseStarter.java:271)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)
at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:568)
at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.invokeFramework(Main.java:651)
at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.basicRun(Main.java:588)
at org.eclipse.equinox.launcher.Main.run(Main.java:1459)

Can someone please suggest that how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Install ERP component on PPM system
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I understand we can install PPM component on an existing Netweaver with ERP system but is it possible to install ECC 6.0 on a Netweaver running PPM stand-alone system? 

 

Thanks,
